scripts.docker:up: npm run sync:contract-enums && docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:up:ui: npm run sync:contract-enums && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.ui.yml up --build
scripts.dev:server: pnpm predev && python -m uvicorn main:app --app-dir app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18410
